chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No. D-5371 of 2015 a/w C.P Nos.4750, 4781/2015 & 2074/2021 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No.22667/2015 2. For hearing of main case 03.02.2026. Syed Shohrat Hussain Rizvi, Advocate for Respondent- EOBI. --------------- No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioners and no intimation has been received. The Petitions stand dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE TariqAli/PS
